entries.report: rendered board-ready (standard, not --daily): Strong / improving; binding constraint CoWoS/HBM advanced packaging; DMI 0.573 (Δ -0.127 vs prior 2026-07 vintage), SMI 0.287 (Δ +0.227), SDGI 0.287; 6/6 dimensions grounded; bottleneck dimension improved Weak->Mixed vs 2026-06 memory
